nasb.text: The burden of the word of the Lord concerning Israel. T  hus declares the Lord who stretches out the heavens, lays the foundation of the earth, and forms the spirit of man within him,

esv.text: The oracle of the word of the Lord concerning Israel: Thus declares the Lord, who stretched out the heavens and founded the earth and formed the spirit of man within him:

cnv.text: 以下是耶和華的默示，這是耶和華論到以色列的話：

ccb.text: 以下是耶和华关于以色列的启示。 铺展穹苍、奠立大地的根基、塑造人灵魂的耶和华说：
